title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TVS Supply Chain Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TVS Supply Chain Solutions
jsonLd.description:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About TVS Supply Chain Solutions:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Supply Chain Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
